title: Fog skips Hit Dice Roll and is immune to opponent magic

card.rawText: This card does not perform a Hit Dice Roll when in battle. It moves directly to its Atk Dice Roll. This card is not affected by your opponents' magic cards.

effect.value: This card does not perform a Hit Dice Roll when in battle. It moves directly to its Atk Dice Roll. This card is not affected by your opponents' magic cards.

plan.title: Fog skips Hit Dice Roll and is immune to opponent magic
plan.summary: Run Fog through battle and verify its no-hit-roll and opponent-magic immunity route is represented.

notes: Read text first: This card does not perform a Hit Dice Roll when in battle. It moves directly to its Atk Dice Roll. This card is not affected by your opponents' magic cards.

steps: Verify the attack advances without a hit roll and immunity is represented.
manualVerification: Also verify opponent magic cannot affect Fog outside the battle route.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run Fog through battle and verify its no-hit-roll and opponent-magic immunity route is represented.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
